meta_description: Compile and run Nomo locally with the production compiler front-end and a sandboxed WebAssembly runtime.
meta_og_description: A private, install-free Nomo compiler and runtime in your browser.
phase_note: The production Nomo compiler front-end and a bounded typed-IR executor run locally in a Web Worker.
example_hello_description: Inference, checked formatting, and three-clause loops.
example_struct_methods_description: A typed record with an explicit implementation block.
example_array_description: Mutation, Option, match, and expression-oriented branches.
example_game_of_life_description: Evolves a five-by-five blinker with arrays and nested loops.
example_fibonacci_closure_description: Models captured closure state explicitly until first-class closures arrive.
example_peano_integers_description: Builds addition from repeated successor operations.
example_concurrent_pi_description: Uses deterministic worker partitions; each lane can become a native task later.
example_concurrent_prime_sieve_descripti: Separates sieve stages into deterministic chunks suitable for future workers.
example_peg_solitaire_description: Backtracks over a compact one-dimensional solitaire board.
example_tree_comparison_description: Recursively compares trees stored behind Array boundaries.
example_clear_screen_description: Uses a portable newline fallback because browser output is not a terminal.
example_http_server_description: Runs a pure request handler; native code can connect it to std.http.listen.
example_display_image_description: Renders a small monochrome image with Unicode block pixels.
example_multiple_files_description: Marks project file boundaries in one buffer; the CLI loads them as modules.
example_sleep_description: Shows deterministic scheduling; native code can replace ticks with time.sleep.
example_test_function_description: Defines a #[test] and calls it in the sandbox demonstration.
example_generic_index_description: Implements one bounds-checked index helper for every Array<T>.
real_build_note: Use the Nomo CLI to emit readable C99 or build a native executable with full host capabilities.
no_problems_note: The production Nomo compiler accepted this source.
awaiting_check_note: Run Check or Run to compile the edited source.
footer_privacy: Local compilation and execution — no source leaves your browser
run_ready_note: Production Nomo compiler · sandboxed WebAssembly runtime
run_success_note: Completed locally in {steps} steps · {bytes} output bytes
run_compile_error_note: The production Nomo compiler rejected this source.
error_description: This playground link is unavailable. Return to the editor and create a fresh share link.
